originalTitle: Bose thinks it can be a media company for some reason
summary: The history books are littered with the corpses of corporate record labels started by companies that had no business being in the music industry. Bose thinks it can be the exception to the rule. It thinks it can be Red Bull. And, while Bose has more of a right to dip its toes into the […]
content: The history books are littered with the corpses of corporate record labels started by companies that had no business being in the music industry. Bose thinks it can be the exception to the rule. It thinks it can be Red Bull. And, while Bose has more of a right to dip its toes into the media world than Build-a-Bear, there’s little reason to believe it can succeed where so many others have failed. In an interview with Business Insider, Bose CMO Jim Mollica said the company had created Bose Studios as part of a move away from traditional “campaign-driven marketing.” A big element of that is going to be Bose Records, a new label the company has formed to “help break underappreciated or new artists.” The competition isn’t the big three — Sony, UMG, Warner — it’s independent labels already being squeezed in an era of bedroom producers and self-distribution. Mollica was transparent about the real goal, though: build a library of music that Bose could feature in its commercials without having to pay the licensing rights for. He said that the company wouldn’t own the artists’ masters or take a share of their streaming or sales revenue, and that they’d be free to sign with other labels. That sounds extremely artist-friendly on its face, which is great. But there’s still a lot we don’t know about the new business venture. Bose is primarily known for making consumer-grade audio gear that tries to put on airs. Most audiophiles will be quick to tell you that Bose products are overpriced and, at best, merely okay. What the company is undeniably great at is marketing. But selling mediocre Bluetooth speakers at inflated prices is very different from discovering talent and promoting artists. Mollica didn’t mention poaching A&R talent from other labels or any splashy celebrity partnerships to launch. Though he did mention that some “legendary Hollywood names” were attached to films and TV series being commissioned by Bose Studios. Which brings us to another issue: a lack of focus. Simply launching a record label is hard enough. Why does Bose — again, whose primary experience is in manufacturing audio hardware — think that it can also launch a movie studio, a podcast network, and a live event production company? These are all things that Mollica said are in the works, according to Business Insider. Perhaps Bose will prove me wrong. But it seems just as likely that Bose Records will eventually find itself listed alongside Starbucks’ Hear Music, Scion A/V, W Records (W Hotels), Green Label Records (Mountain Dew), or TAG Records (Procter & Gamble). Sure, you could argue that Bose, as an audio company, has more of a right to dive into the music industry than those failed ventures. But they featured celebrity endorsements, partnerships with bigger labels, or, at the very least, some specific cultural hook. Bose Studios just seems desperate and unfocused.
chineseTitle: Bose 出于某种原因认为自己可以成为一家媒体公司
chineseSummary: 历史书上到处都是那些与音乐行业无关的公司创办的唱片公司的尸体。 Bose 认为这可能是规则的例外。它认为它可能是红牛。而且，虽然 Bose 更有权利涉足 […]
chineseContent: 历史书上到处都是那些与音乐行业无关的公司创办的唱片公司的尸体。 Bose 认为这可能是规则的例外。它认为它可能是红牛。而且，虽然 Bose 比 Build-a-Bear 更有权涉足媒体世界，但没有理由相信它能够在许多其他公司都失败的地方取得成功。 Bose 首席营销官 Jim Mollica 在接受 Business Insider 采访时表示，公司创建 Bose Studios 是摆脱传统“营销活动驱动的营销”的一部分。其中一个重要元素将是 Bose Records，这是该公司成立的一个新厂牌，旨在“帮助打破不受重视的艺术家或新艺术家的地位”。竞争的不是三巨头——索尼、UMG、华纳——而是已经在卧室制作人和自我发行时代受到挤压的独立唱片公司。不过，Mollica 对于真正的目标是透明的：建立一个 Bose 可以在其广告中展示的音乐库，而无需支付许可费。他表示，该公司不会拥有这些艺术家的大师作品，也不会分享他们的流媒体或销售收入，而且他们可以自由地与其他唱片公司签约。从表面上看，这听起来对艺术家非常友好，这很棒。但对于这项新业务，我们还有很多不了解的地方。 Bose 主要以生产消费级音频设备而闻名，这些设备试图装腔作势。大多数发烧友很快就会告诉您，Bose 产品价格过高，而且充其量只是还过得去。无可否认，该公司最擅长的是营销。但以高价销售平庸的蓝牙音箱与发现人才和提拔艺术家有很大不同。 Mollica 没有提到从其他厂牌挖走 A&R 人才，也没有提到任何引人注目的名人合作伙伴关系
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
